subcodes.first_line: O Manifestation of resignation and contentment! If thou wouldst fully manifest these two praiseworthy attributes and laudable qualities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظهر تسلیم و رضا اگر مظهریت این دو صفت ممدوحه و حقیقت محموده را بتمامها
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
